title: Astra – Italian Hexagonal Metal L-164

description: Premium semi-rimless design for a professional look. Fitted with high-clarity blue light shielding lenses that reduce glare from artificial lighting and overhead displays.

description: Sleek retro-style clubmaster frames with hybrid acetate and metal rims. Equipped with premium blue light blocking filters to shield eyes during long workspace sessions.

title: Bella Cat-Eye Crystal – L-992

title: Premium Hard-Shell Leather Case

title: Anti-Fog Lens Cleaning Spray & Microfiber Kit

title: Premium Braided Leather Glasses Cord

title: Polarized Clip-On Sunglasses Attachment

title: Ultra-Soft Microfiber Pouch & Cleaning Cloth Set
